Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants an analysis of three loan application cases Case ID 1 2 and 3 based on a provided event log and a set of rules

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Part 1 Normative Process Behavior Strict Rules Sequence Application Received to Credit Check to Risk Assessment to Loan Decision to Inform Applicant Conditional Logic If Approved Finalize Documentation to Close Case If Rejected Close Case No Finalize Documentation Constraints No skipping no reordering no contradictions

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Part 2 Desiderata Recommended but Not Strict Timing Credit Check less than 24 hours after App Received Timing Inform Applicant less than 48 hours after Loan Decision Optional Activity Follow up Call encouraged but not required

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 1 Normative Check Sequence matches exactly Approved path followed Finalize before Close

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1 Desiderata Check Credit Check timing 30 mins after App less than 24h OK Inform Applicant timing 2 hours after Decision less than 48h OK Follow up call Absent This is a desideratum failure but usually absence of an optional step is not a violation of a strict rule just missing a recommendation

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 2 Normative Check Sequence Violation Risk Assessment happened before Credit Check The rule says Credit Check must be performed before any risk evaluation Conditional Logic Violation Loan Decision was Rejected However Finalize Documentation occurred before closing Rule says If the loan is rejected close without finalizing documentation and Performing Finalize Documentation after a rejection is not allowed Ordering check Even though Credit Check eventually happened the order was wrong relative to Risk Assessment

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 3 Normative Check Sequence is correct App to CC to RA to Dec to Info to Fin to Close Approved path logic holds

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 3 Desiderata Check Credit Check Timing Jan 12 9am to Jan 14 10am 49 hours Constraint was less than 24h Violation Inform Applicant Timing Jan 14 12pm to Jan 16 15pm 51 hours Constraint was less than 48h Violation Follow up call Missing Missing Recommendation

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Case 2 Why did this happen Maybe a system glitch allowed manual override Or perhaps Risk Assessment here was actually a preliminary screening mislabeled Or simply human error rushing

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Case 3 Delays Weekend effect Jan 12 is Friday Jan 14 is Sunday Usually banks do not process then Maybe backlog

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Structure Introduction Section for Normative Analysis Cases 1 vs 2 vs 3 Section for Desiderata Analysis Section for Interpretations Justifications

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 1 Perfect compliance on strict rules Missed follow up desiderata Case 2 Major violations Reason A Precedence constraint violation RA before CC Reason B Negative constraint violation Doc finalization on rejection path Case 3 Strict rule compliant Soft rule violations Reason A Latency on Credit Check greater than 24h Reason B Latency on Notification greater than 48h Reason C Omission of Follow up

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Self Correction during drafting Ensure I do not mark Case 1 as violating the follow up call as a normative rule It is explicitly under Part 2 So Case 1 is Normatively Clean
